title: medicago falcata var. major-prostrata
intro: Medicago falcata var. major-prostrata, also known as the small-leafed lucerne or prostrate yellow sweet clover, is a perennial legume that belongs to the Fabaceae family. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing fever and alleviating symptoms of colds, coughs, and respiratory infections, as well as exhibiting antioxidant and anti-cancer properties. Medicago falcata var. major-prostrata can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
